description: I am 33 years old and I was born and raised in Lansing, Michigan. Now reside in Okemos, Mi, Growing up I was always fascinated with two particular things, shoes and art. I Created this brand 2/08/2016. I created Heart N Sole because growing up my mother raised me and my brother and sisters by her self it was very hard we didn't have the best clothes or shoes and people bullied and teased me because we didn't fit in.  i came up with the bear logo it represents being strong and and independent, my inspiration was Kanye West as a designer he also used a bear looking character. title: BRIGHTR
description:
BRIGHTR creates transformative short form stories inspired by larger-than-sports moments.

Meeting YouTube's standards for originality and transformative use is something we take seriously. It's built into how we work at every stage, from the first line of the script to the final cut.

Each video is meticulously scripted and edited, combining original structure, narration, visual sequencing, custom transitions, color grading, and fresh context through our original commentaries.

We put a heavy emphasis on transforming raw footage into something entirely new, giving familiar moments a perspective, voice, and story they didn't have before.

Our team works across a specialized stack of five industry-standard tools, each chosen to serve a specific stage of the creative process. We deliver new meaning, insight, and emotional impact to every single one of our videos.

title: Shred Hub
description:
I’ll show you some homie love :
This channel is for skateboarding info and entertainment. Tricks are done by experienced skaters—always skate safely and within your limits.
We’re building the largest skateboarding community, connecting skaters worldwide through shared passion, culture, motivation, and insane clips.
All Shorts are fully transformed: we combine multiple clips, use small portions, add heavy editing, effects, zooms, color grading, captions, narration, sound effects, and original scripts. No raw uploads, only original, engaging, copyright-safe content.
We highlight the craziest tricks, insane fails, and top skate moments, keeping every Short fast, exciting, and motivating. Our team spends hours crafting each video to make it unique, fun, and shareable.
We take YouTube seriously as a real business, creating unique, compliant, high-quality videos that entertain and inspire.
Join the family 🛹🔥

title: Hall of Game
description:
Hall of Game transforms iconic sports moments into cinematic, story-driven content. We don't just repackage highlights, we create original narratives that provide fans with deeper context, emotional connection, and showcase the landscape of sports culture.

Each video is a fully reimagined story combining the most advanced editing techniques, customized 3D scenes, commentary, researched context, and footage curated from dozens of sources to reframe raw clips into engaging, transformative stories. On average, each video takes our strategy team 3-4 hours to story board and our editing team 6-8 hours to create. We are dedicated to producing content that meets YouTube' standards for originality and transformative use.

title: I Love Basketball
description:
I Love Basketball brings the spirit of the game to life through cinematic storytelling and creative editing. We go beyond highlights exploring the passion, history, and culture that make basketball one of the most inspiring sports on Earth.

Each video combines advanced editing, immersive sound design, original commentary, and detailed research to create an authentic and emotional experience for true fans. From legendary rivalries to hidden stories, we rebuild every moment with care, purpose, and respect for the game’s legacy.

Our team is dedicated to producing content that meets YouTube’s standards for originality and transformative use ensuring every piece is crafted with creativity, depth, and love for basketball.
